{"code":"
import pandas as pd

var_tool_query_db_Qn9W1449G779g6V6Gf4h = dab_load_rows(var_tool_query_db_Qn9W1449G779g6V6Gf4h)

df = pd.DataFrame(var_tool_query_db_Qn9W1449G779g6V6Gf4h)

df["Date"] = pd.to_datetime(df["Date"], errors="coerce")
df = df.dropna(subset=["Date"])

df["Year"] = df["Date"].dt.year
df_2018 = df[df["Year"] == 2018]

def count_up_down(index_df):
    up_days = len(index_df[index_df["Close"] > index_df["Open"]])
    down_days = len(index_df[index_df["Close"] < index_df["Open"]])
    return up_days, down_days

nya_up, nya_down = count_up_down(df_2018[df_2018["Index"] == "NYA"])
ixic_up, ixic_down = count_up_down(df_2018[df_2018["Index"] == "IXIC"])
gptse_up, gptse_down = count_up_down(df_2018[df_2018["Index"] == "GSPTSE"])


result = []
if ixic_up > ixic_down:
    result.append(f"IXIC")
if nya_up > nya_down:
    pass
if gptse_up > gptse_down:
    pass


print("__RESULT__:" + str(result))
"}

args.code:
import pandas as pd
import json

var_tool_query_db_Elm2iQUKfOfuBLNfLQ3Y = dab_load_rows(var_tool_query_db_Elm2iQUKfOfuBLNfLQ3Y)

df = pd.DataFrame(var_tool_query_db_Elm2iQUKfOfuBLNfLQ3Y)


def count_up_down(index_df):
    up_days = len(index_df[index_df["Close"] > index_df["Open"]])
    down_days = len(index_df[index_df["Close"] < index_df["Open"]])
    return up_days, down_days

nya_up, nya_down = count_up_down(df[df["Index"] == "NYA"])
ixic_up, ixic_down = count_up_down(df[df["Index"] == "IXIC"])
gptse_up, gptse_down = count_up_down(df[df["Index"] == "GSPTSE"])


result = []
if ixic_up > ixic_down:
    result.append("IXIC")
if nya_up > nya_down:
    pass
if gptse_up > gptse_down:
    pass

print("__RESULT__:" + json.dumps(result))
